name: intelliops
description: AI-Powered Incident Management & Root Cause Analysis Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,user,log,incident,ai,alert,web -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,red,white "npm run dev -w @intelliops/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @intelliops/user-service" "npm run dev -w @intelliops/log-service" "npm run dev -w @intelliops/incident-service" "npm run dev -w @intelliops/ai-service" "npm run dev -w @intelliops/alert-service" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n gateway,web -c blue,white "npm run dev -w @intelliops/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w frontend"
